archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) crossed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Specific Theme: Technical Command Center / Cybernetic Brutalism.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase font-mono text-[#F3F4F6]
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight uppercase font-mono text-[#F3F4F6]
typography.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-semibold uppercase font-mono text-[#F3F4F6]
typography.glitch_effect: Implement via CSS using text-shadow with cyan and subtle magenta to simulate terminal distortion, or simply sharp primary text.

layout_and_spacing.corners: rounded-none (0px border-radius strictly enforced across ALL elements, cards, and buttons)
layout_and_spacing.border_collapse: Use explicit borders `border border-[#262626]` on cards/grid containers to create a skeletal, command-center look (The Grid Borders rule).

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] font-mono hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-[#262626] text-[#F3F4F6] font-mono hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4

inputs.terminal_style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#00E5FF]/50 focus:border-[#00E5FF] text-[#00E5FF] font-mono outline-none px-0 py-2 w-full placeholder:text-[#00E5FF]/30 transition-all text-lg

components.systemic_note: border-l-2 border-[#00E5FF] bg-[#00E5FF]/5 p-6 my-8 font-mono text-sm text-[#F3F4F6] relative
components.tags: inline-block border border-[#262626] bg-[#060606] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono text-[#00E5FF] uppercase tracking-wider

sections_instructions.command_center_home: Full viewport height hero utilizing the 40px blueprint grid background. 'Glitch' headline styling. Terminal-style email capture block functioning like a CLI prompt (`> ENTER_ACCESS_CODE@EMAIL.COM`). Include blinking block cursor effect.
sections_instructions.depot_product_suite: A 'Blueprint View' bento grid. Display the `isometric_product` image as the flagship visual. Incorporate a 'Technical Specs' list styled similarly to code syntax or JSON format. Include a Payhip checkout button trigger.
sections_instructions.signal_blog: Article layout architecture with a Sticky Conversion sidebar. Blog briefs grouped via systemic monospace tags [STRATEGY], [AUTOMATION], [MONETIZATION]. Use the `systemic_note` component. Interlink section styled as 'Suggested Infrastructure'.
sections_instructions.infrastructure_affiliate: Grid layout representing 'Core Modules'. Each module card features an 'Architect's Review' and a strict monospaced affiliate disclaimer. Keep logos and module graphics highly technical.
sections_instructions.footer: System status bar footer. Include 'STATUS: ONLINE' with a blinking neon green/cyan dot. Minimalist social links. Include a CLI-style help menu or directory path.

hero_blueprint.description: Abstract digital architecture blueprint with glowing electric blue geometric lines. Perfect for hero background overlay or command center ambient visual.

terminal_bg.description: Dark terminal interface background. Use for depth in sections that need high-tech texture without distracting from content.

isometric_product.description: Isometric 3D software box mockup. Mandatory use in The Depot section to represent the flagship digital product.

server_rack_bg.description: Modern rack-mounted server units. Good contextual background image for the 'Infrastructure' (Affiliate Stack) section (use heavy dark #060606 overlay).

icons.instructions: Use with strokeWidth={1.5} or 1.25. Stick strictly to geometric, hard-edged icons representing technical interfaces.

testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements and key text nodes MUST have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='terminal-email-submit', data-testid='product-checkout-trigger', data-testid='affiliate-link-item', data-testid='system-status-indicator'.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Enforce Archetype 7 / Command Center Brutalism. The background MUST have the 40px grid effect (`bg-[size:40px_40px]`). All corners MUST be `rounded-none`. Typography MUST strictly follow JetBrains Mono for headers/UI elements and Inter for body text. Ensure pure high contrast between Deep Black #060606 and Electric Blue #00E5FF. Implement CSS hover glows. Do NOT use standard Shadcn borders/radius; override everything to be sharp, skeletal, and terminal-like.
